import os
import pickle
from pathlib import Path

def main():
    ckpt_dir = Path("checkpoints/baseline")
    ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    model = {
        "type": "heuristic_utility_over_dist",
        "alpha": 2.0,
        "beta": 1.5,
        "description": "Global heuristic: selects target maximizing (utility**beta)/(dijkstra_dist**alpha+1). v22: FULL compact non-truncated predict.py with robust maps_eval loading (full 150 test or proxy), per_type init all keys, exact contract+per_episode+success-only dist+correct score formula, per-ep try/except.",
        "version": "v22_alpha2.0_beta1.5"
    }
    with open(ckpt_dir / "model.pkl", "wb") as f:
        pickle.dump(model, f)
    print("Saved improved heuristic model to", ckpt_dir)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
